title: Copy To feature
excerpt: I know we can duplicate a task or subtask and then move it to a different board or group. I am wondering if we can get functionality to have a “DUPLICATE TO” or “COPY TO” function that would allow a task or subtask to be…

posts.author: roman.yurek (Roman Yurek)
posts.cookedHtml: I know we can duplicate a task or subtask and then move it to a different board or group. I am wondering if we can get functionality to have a “DUPLICATE TO” or “COPY TO” function that would allow a task or subtask to be duplicated and moved all in 1 step. And hopefully without the need to add a “(copy)” text to the duplicated item. This would allow higher efficiency by combining 2 actions into 1.

posts.author: LupApps (Idan Lupo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Roman,

We had the exact same pain as you, this is why we found Quick Access to monday.com app.
This app allows you to duplicate items with only 1 step

let me know if it’s what you’ve been looking for

Idan
